narrative:
Orange-Combined township has 1,654 registered voters, with 50.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.7 percentage points.
